value.found_quote:
The browser uses a two-layer security system to control which URLs can be accessed:
- **Denylist** - Deny dangerous/malicious URLs
- **Allowlist** - Explicitly allow trusted URLs
value.rationale: The page, hosted on antigravity.google (Google's Antigravity IDE docs), explicitly describes a two-layer browser security system combining a server-enforced denylist (via the BadUrlsChecker RPC service) and a locally editable allowlist text file, matching the claim precisely. No lifecycle caveats are present, so it reads as currently active.
